title: Entry-Level Business Development Manager at Lodha Group

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Business Development Manager at Lodha Group
jsonLd.description:
Lodha Group has an exciting opening for a Business Development Manager at our Rajkot office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Lodha Group:
Lodha Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lodha Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
